rules.rule_text:
rule sneakernet_trojan
{
	meta:
		author = "@patrickrolsen"
		maltype = "Sneakernet Trojan"
		version = "0.1"
		reference = "http://www.fidelissecurity.com/webfm_send/375"
		date = "01/30/2014"

	strings:
		$s1 = "Mtx_Sp_On_PC_1_2_8"
		$s2 = "%s /c del %s"
		$s3 = "RECYCLED"

	condition:
		uint16( 0 ) == 0x5A4D and ( all of ( $s* ) )
}
